mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `product`(title, description, trade_location, image, price, user_id, status, create_time) VALUES( #{title}, #{description}, #{tradeLocation}, #{image}, IFNULL(#{price}, 0), #{userId}, IFNULL(#{status}, 1), IFNULL(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, trade_location, image, price, user_id, status, create_time FROM `product` WHERE status = 1
SELECT id, title, description, trade_location, image, price, user_id, status, create_time FROM `product` WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, title, description, trade_location, image, price, user_id, status, create_time FROM `product` WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = 1

SELECT id, title, description, trade_location, image, price, user_id, status, create_time FROM `product` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.trade_location, p.image, p.price, p.user_id, u.username AS publisher_name, p.status, p.create_time FROM `product` p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.user_id = u.id
p.status = #{status}
AND
( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
